tools.name: classify_personal_data
tools.description: Classify data fields as personal, special category, or anonymous per GDPR.

tools.name: assess_lawful_basis
tools.description: Determine appropriate lawful basis for processing personal data.

tools.name: generate_dpia
tools.description: Generate a Data Protection Impact Assessment template per GDPR Article 35.

tools.name: check_data_transfer
tools.description: Assess legality of international personal data transfers under GDPR Chapter V.

tools.name: calculate_breach_severity
tools.description: Score a data breach severity and determine ICO notification requirements.

tools.name: generate_privacy_notice
tools.description: Generate an Article 13/14 compliant privacy notice.
